Friends from work tax
siblings
silly boy
handsome boy
boop incoming
do you hear what I hear
the best floofy boy MV Edit- this post has the best comments ever - I love hearing everyone’s little things they do - humans can be so neat ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

item.title: Just an FYI post, you can use these without being a runner.
item.dc:creator: SpriteandCats

item.title: Yay!
item.description: ...by an extrovert ....in our 30s. I live alone, live away from my family and occasionally go to community events for enjoyment. The closest thing I have to a romantic partner, travels about 50% of the time for work and we don't live together--and am completly content. Now a group of people, instead of one-offs know me (who me?). I got included on a team at adult dodgeball league instead of being a drop-in. People recgonize me from week-to week; and when I miss a week (!?). Im even in my first group chat. When I start to get quiet or lost in the shuffle my extrovert suggests things to the group to include me or tells me to reach out to this person or that. I am a little uncomfortable with how infantizing it sometimes is, and am unsure how long this will last with me being in this life and/or them putting in the work so I have to figure out quickly if I like it and if I do, how to sustain it. But it's kinda cool now and I appreciate someone thinking of me and sharing what brings them joy. Always thought the being adopted by an extrovert meme was a joke, dramatizing friends just being quieter or more talkative but it's a thing and I am eternality grateful for being able to try on a new type of life if only temporary. Sorry too mushy?
item.dc:creator: Raecracy123abc

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: We're sorry we're not able to deliver!.
item.dc:creator: Zakiamon

item.title: Wonder Woman Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: Wanted to paint Wonder Woman again, I thought the lyrics were very fitting for the world and wanted to do something with it :) Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror I use professional body paint covers this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle I did not go to art school, I am self taught. I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007 If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am British I do not go outside like this to scare people I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life If you're still here I have now recovered from my cold! I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these / I am “pretending” to paint myself
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Even the UK's most right-wing newspapers are running anti-Trump articles this morning
item.description:
The Daily Mail, a.k.a. The Daily Heil
From the Daily Telegraph
Yeah, I know the Mirror isn’t a right-wing rag
This one is
The Sun avoided the subject on its front page

item.title: Stolen memes for my work group February edition #1
item.description: Memes marked mature because I'm not.
item.dc:creator: AutoBat

item.title: Fighting the Good fight
item.description: This lone warrior is out in my neck of the woods fighting the Good fight! I saw her while I was driving home from work, and brought her some fries to fuel the fire. I don't have a lot of means and can't make it to the state capital to speak out in person, but it is nice to know that I am not alone out here. As I was leaving, some bald Nazi drove past in his beat up little car, flipped me off, and proceeded to get out of his car next to her and film himself harassing her. I have no doubt that she can handle him, but it is rough being out there alone. Had I not had my child with me, I would still be there.
item.dc:creator: derekthecleric

item.title: This always cracks me up
item.description: 1st interview done! I'll (hopefully) hear back from them by the end of the week. EDIT: I GOT A DISHWASHER JOB FOR 3 WEEKS FUCKYEAAAAAHHHH THOSE PLATES ARE GONNA SHINE BRIGHTER THAN MY FUTURE. -- Just over 2 weeks until I get any welfare help. Homeless until then. If you feel you can help, please check my bio or reach out by DM. Any help at all is sincerely appreciated. Be excellent to each other x
